zh.lifeSummary: 當Janet Crichton of of Cranstoun-Riddle, latterly Countess of Morton於1461年1月1日出生在英國蘇格蘭艾丁波時，她的父親Sir David Crichton of Cranstoun-Riddle26歲，母親Deborah Erskine21歲。她於1483年與John Douglas 2nd Earl of Morton, 4th Lord of Dalkeith在蘇格蘭洛包爾利德爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1516年在英國蘇格蘭藍納可爾波維爾享年55歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Janet Crichton of of Cranstoun-Riddle, latterly Countess of Morton于1461年1月1日出生在英国苏格兰艾丁波时，她的父亲Sir David Crichton of Cranstoun-Riddle26岁，母亲Deborah Erskine21岁。她于1483年与John Douglas 2nd Earl of Morton, 4th Lord of Dalkeith在苏格兰洛包爾利德爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1516年在英国苏格兰藍納可爾波維爾享年55岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Crichton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Creighton
meanings: Scottish and Irish: habitational name from Crichton, near Edinburgh, first recorded c. 1128 in the form Crectune, in 1287 as Crecton, and in 1360 as Creychtona. The name is probably an early hybrid compound of Old Welsh creic ‘rock’ + Older Scots tun ‘farm, settlement’ (Old English tūn). In Ireland and Britain, this form of the name is now found chiefly in northern Ireland; the more usual Scottish forms are Crichton and Crighton .
Irish: sometimes used for Gaelic Ó Creacháin or Ó Criocháin (see Crehan ).
English: habitational name from Creighton in Staffordshire, named with Celtic creig ‘rock’ + Old English tūn ‘settlement’.

nameMeanings.name: Janet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

variants.name: Jannet
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

en.lifeSummary: When Janet Crichton of of Cranstoun-Riddle, latterly Countess of Morton was born on 1 January 1461, in Edinburgh, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Sir David Crichton of Cranstoun-Riddle, was 26 and her mother, Deborah Erskine, was 21. She married John Douglas 2nd Earl of Morton, 4th Lord of Dalkeith in 1483, in Riddell, Roxburghshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1516, in Bothwell, Lanarkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 55, and was buried in Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Janet Crichton of of Cranstoun-Riddle, latterly Countess of Morton est née le 1 janvier 1461, à Edinburgh, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir David Crichton of Cranstoun-Riddle, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Deborah Erskine, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé John Douglas 2nd Earl of Morton, 4th Lord of Dalkeith en 1483, à Riddell, Roxburghshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1516, à Bothwell, Lanarkshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterrée à Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Janet Crichton of of Cranstoun-Riddle, latterly Countess of Morton am 1. Januar 1461 in Edinburgh, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir David Crichton of Cranstoun-Riddle 26 und ihre Mutter Deborah Erskine 21. Sie hat 1483 in Riddell, Roxburghshire, Scotland John Douglas 2nd Earl of Morton, 4th Lord of Dalkeith geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1516 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Bothwell, Lanarkshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Janet Crichton of of Cranstoun-Riddle, latterly Countess of Morton è nata il il 1 gennaio 1461 nel Edinburgh, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir David Crichton of Cranstoun-Riddle, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Deborah Erskine, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato John Douglas 2nd Earl of Morton, 4th Lord of Dalkeith nel 1483, nel Riddell, Roxburghshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1516, nel Bothwell, Lanarkshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolta a Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Janet Crichton of of Cranstoun-Riddle, latterly Countess of Mortonが1461年1月1日にイギリススコットランドエディンブルグで生まれた時，父Sir David Crichton of Cranstoun-Riddleは26歳，母Deborah Erskineは21歳であった。1483年にスコットランドロクスブルグhシュアイアリッドエルでJohn Douglas 2nd Earl of Morton, 4th Lord of Dalkeithと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1516年にイギリススコットランドラナルクシュアイアボスウエルで55歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Janet Crichton of of Cranstoun-Riddle, latterly Countess of Morton(이)가 1461년 1월 1일 영국 스코틀랜드 에딘버그에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir David Crichton of Cranstoun-Riddle(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Deborah Erskine(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1483년 스컷랜드 록스버그h실르 리데에서 John Douglas 2nd Earl of Morton, 4th Lord of Dalkeith(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1516년 영국 스코틀랜드 랜아르크실르 벗웰에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Janet Crichton of of Cranstoun-Riddle, latterly Countess of Morton nasceu em 1 de janeiro de 1461, em Edinburgh, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir David Crichton of Cranstoun-Riddle, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Deborah Erskine, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com John Douglas 2nd Earl of Morton, 4th Lord of Dalkeith em 1483, em Riddell, Roxburghshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1516, em Bothwell, Lanarkshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 55 anos, e foi sepultada em Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Janet Crichton of of Cranstoun-Riddle, latterly Countess of Morton родилась 1 января 1461 г. в местности эдинбург, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir David Crichton of Cranstoun-Riddle было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Deborah Erskine, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Douglas 2nd Earl of Morton, 4th Lord of Dalkeith в 1483 г. в местности ридделл, роксбургшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1516 г. в местности ботвелл, ланаркшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 55 лет и была похоронена в местности Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Janet Crichton of of Cranstoun-Riddle, latterly Countess of Morton nació el 1 de enero de 1461, en Edinburgh, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir David Crichton of Cranstoun-Riddle, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Deborah Erskine, tenía 21 años. Se casó con John Douglas 2nd Earl of Morton, 4th Lord of Dalkeith en 1483, en Riddell, Roxburghshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1516, en Bothwell, Lanarkshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultada en Escocia, Reino Unido.
